MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-15-2010 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR JURY ON DEC-06-2010 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE IS HEARD. STEVEN MCDONALD APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. JONATHAN BORNSTEIN APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS. THE COURT WILL SEND NOTICE OF A NEW MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE AND ALL PRE-TRIAL MOTIONS TO BE FILED IN DEPT. 206. AFTER PARTIES HAVE MET AND CONFERRED, THE SCHEDULE IS AS FOLLOWS: (1) BY SEPT. 24, 2010, DEFENDANTS WILL PROPOUND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS; (2) BY OCT. 11, 2010, PLAINTIFF WILL RESPOND TO THAT DISCOVERY AND DEFENDANTS WILL RESPOND TO THE OUTSTANDING DISCOVERY; (3) BY OCT. 22, 2010, THE DEFENDANTS AND THE PLAINTIFF AND AGENT WILL APPEAR FOR THE DEPOSITION. MR. BORNSTEIN WILL ALSO FILE A SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY. PREVAILING PARTY WILL PREPARE A PROPOSED STIPULATION AND ORDER AS REFLECTED ON THE MINUTES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
